description:
- v3.4.36: Configurable summary frequency: SUMMARY_FREQUENCY (daily/weekly), SUMMARY_DAY, and SUMMARY_HOUR config keys. New-keys modal will prompt on next Config Editor open.
- v3.4.37: Config Editor/modal improvements: allowed_values validation for SUMMARY_FREQUENCY, dropdowns in new-keys modal, HTML bold in descriptions.
- v3.4.38: Config Editor main editor: dropdowns for allowed_values/day_names fields, bold descriptions rendering correctly.
